description_long: This is a simple, open, three-tier shelving unit with a minimalist design. The frame appears to be constructed from metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a matte gray finish, providing structural support at the corners and along the sides. Each of the three shelves is made from a light-colored wood or wood composite, with a smooth, flat surface suitable for storing or displaying items. The shelves are evenly spaced and lack any doors, drawers, or visible hardware, emphasizing functionality and ease of access. The open design allows for visibility and accessibility from the front and sides, making it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban storage spaces. The overall construction suggests durability and practicality for holding various objects in an urban environment.
description: A minimalist, open three-tier shelving unit with a gray metal frame and light wood shelves, designed for accessible storage or display. The structure is sturdy and functional, with no doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three open wooden shelves framed by gray metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the metal frame's vertical supports.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the open back and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the shelf depth and frame.
